actions.name: list_locations
actions.description: List nearby pet store locations with business hours and service radius

actions.name: list_services
actions.description: List grooming services (bath, teeth brushing, etc.) by pet type

actions.name: list_products
actions.description: List pet products (food, litter, supplies) by pet type and category

actions.name: query_inventory
actions.description: Check product inventory at a specific store

actions.name: get_store_calendar
actions.description: Get store calendar with business hours, breaks, and booked slots

actions.name: query_availability
actions.description: Query available appointment time slots for a service at a store

actions.name: list_user_addresses
actions.description: List saved pickup or delivery addresses for pet services

actions.name: save_user_address
actions.description: Save or update a pickup or delivery address for future pet services

actions.name: list_pet_profiles
actions.description: List saved pet profiles and pet service preferences

actions.name: save_pet_profile
actions.description: Save or update pet profile details, preferences, inventory notes, and service history

actions.name: create_booking
actions.description: Create a grooming booking with idempotency support

actions.name: modify_booking
actions.description: Modify an existing booking (time, service, store)

actions.name: create_order
actions.description: Create a product order with idempotency support
